creator: fluffy@Fluffy.Khv.RU
text:
By Adrian's request, I provide chatlog for PR history:


21:45:08ÂšDima PanovÂš
19 hours uptime, about 20 log lines with "ath0: bb hang detected (0x80), resetting", but it still works. 
and another: my link aggregation (wire + wifi) shown next lines:
wlan0: link state changed to DOWN
lagg0: link state changed to DOWN
wlan0: link state changed to UP
lagg0: link state changed to UP

21:51:01ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
hm, ok
21:51:06ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
And with that -HEAD you tested with
21:51:07ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
that you said worked
21:51:11ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
you didn't get any BB hangs, right?
21:53:10ÂšDima PanovÂš
i've got BB hangs already for last 4-5 months... but it not leads to unusable interface until reported version/
21:53:18ÂšDima PanovÂš
now it works with r221480:221612M:
21:53:18ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
I have to head off, please attach this and dmesg | grep ath from your boot
21:53:22ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Ok
21:53:30ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
was there a point in time when you didn't have BB hangs and things worked?
21:53:55ÂšDima PanovÂš
ath0: <Atheros 9285> mem 0xf0000000-0xf000ffff irq 19 at device 0.0 on pci9 
[ath] Enabling diversity for Kite 
ath0: AR9285 mac 192.2 RF5133 phy 14.0 
21:54:06ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
ah yes, antenna diversity for Kite
21:54:09ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
blah I'm debugging that too at the moment
21:54:36ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
So you've always had bb hangs, or has there been a point in the past where it worked fine with no BB hangs?
21:54:39ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
that's what's important
21:54:57ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
I have to rush off
21:54:59ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Just let me know this
21:55:05ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
(and then put all of this info in the PR
21:55:06ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
)
21:55:15ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Was there ever a point where the AR9285 was working for you with no BB hangs?
21:55:30ÂšDima PanovÂš
i didn't remember exactly, but before november bb hangs was rare
21:55:47ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
ok
21:55:50ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
rarer than now?
21:55:57ÂšDima PanovÂš
yep
21:55:59ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
ok
21:56:12ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
would you mind testing a late september sys/dev/ath/ directory?
21:56:19ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
(you'll have to patch the sys/conf/files list to be able to build it though)
21:56:30ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
in fact, no
21:56:31ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
let's do that after
21:56:37ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Let's test a more recent version
21:56:41ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
We'll go hunting for that later, ok?
21:56:59ÂšDima PanovÂš
2-3 message for 2-day uptime was normal in november
21:57:31ÂšDima PanovÂš
yep. so which revision i need to update now?
21:57:34ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Well, your environment may have changed
21:57:38ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
we can test that later
21:58:18ÂšDima PanovÂš
nope, same AP, same 2 laptops, same 3 another APs available at building
21:58:27ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Yeah
21:58:32ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
As I said, it's a later problem. :)
21:58:32ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
ok?
21:58:39ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
We'll test a september/october kernel
21:58:41ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Sorry, ath
21:58:44ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Now that we know
21:58:55ÂšDima PanovÂš
ok, i'm ready
21:59:36ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Try r221596
22:00:01ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Please remember to add the above to the PR
22:00:04ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
both the version that worked
22:00:07ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
What we're next trying
22:00:16ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
and the fact that you remember there being less BB hangs in November
22:00:20ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
Just so we don't lose track, ok?
22:00:36ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
I gotta run out, sorry :)
22:00:43ÂšDima PanovÂš
good, will attach chatlog to PR
22:00:49ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
cool-o
22:00:56ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
and I'm going to add some more diversity related hackery to freebsd
22:00:56ÂšAdrian ChaddÂš
bbl
22:01:13ÂšDima PanovÂš
good luck!

-- 
Dima Panov (fluffy@FreeBSD.org)
KDE@FreeBSD team

Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/fluffy.khv
